Notes: RPI breaks open a close game late in second half, led by senior Caitlin Vestal
and her 18 points and 10 rebounds.  Kaitlyn Saunders led the Red Hawks with
20 points while Jacqi Ferrari chipped in with six points and ten rebounds.
The Ephs were paced by Colleen Hession's 23 points, including six three's.
